instructions: Edit only the text values if you want safe replacement later.
Keep file, line, and group keys unchanged.
Texts are grouped by screen files first, then shared component files.

(tabs)/ai.tsx.text:
Hi! I'm your Piqle AI Coach for pickleball.

What's your main goal right now? For example: getting fit, improving your DUPR rating, finding tournaments, or just having more fun on the court. Tell me and we'll make a plan.
How do I register for a tournament?
